text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My dear Trainer. With today being Valentine's
Day, I've prepared a present for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to give it to you now, so would you mind
accompanying me somewhere?
choice_data_list: Where would you like to go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The usual spots would be behind the school
building or a local cafe to enjoy a chocolate
parfait together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's not far. By plane, it's about... seven hours
or so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: There, have a look at this adorable cocoa tree.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I planted it just for you, Trainer. And now, this
entire tree is yours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That means each and every cocoa bean it
produces will belong to you as well, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's the Mejiro family for you. They operate on
a different scale entirely... I never thought I'd be
given my very own cocoa tree.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It'll be some time before it bears pods, so please
wait a short while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let me see... Well, from what I've been told,
around four years or thereabouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's going to take much, much longer than I
thought before I get to savor any of this tree's
produce...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry about that. But I do believe that
the more patiently you wait, the more
scrumptious the flavor will end up being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Your own personal cocoa tree, Trainer, and the
precious cocoa beans it will produce for you and
you alone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wanted you to enjoy a flavor all your own. I
expect it shall be one you'll never forget.
choice_data_list: You might just be right about that...
You might just be right about that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Delicious chocolate might be easy to find these
days, but chocolate made from this particular
cocoa tree...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It will have a flavor all its own. It looks like Mejiro
Bright wants to gift me the experience of tasting
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I promise you, Trainer, that once this tree's cocoa
pods are ripe, I shall use them to make chocolate
for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'll grind them up, and griiind them up some
more. ♪ Right up until they're a fine powder...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Then, after one more year...
choice_data_list: I'd rather you picked up the pace at that point...
I'd rather you picked up the pace at that point...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, every step of the process is going to
take a full year. I feel my mouth twitch into a wry
smile as the two of us enjoy the scenery of the
cocoa fields.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Bear in mind that the first year the tree's ready to
be harvested won't be the only year I make
chocolate. Cocoa trees really are something, you
know...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I hear that they produce beans for fifty whole
years.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's right, and I wish to make chocolates for
every single one of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the taste will vary from year to year,
what with the weather and temperature changes.
But then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We'll also change as the years pass. And we'll
make more and more memories as we do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lot can change over the course of fifty years.
It's possible that nothing we have now will stay
the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Change can be a little frightening, but it can be a
source of excitement, too. Changes are just one
more thing for us to treasure. Oh, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I do believe some things will stay the same.
Specifically...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The Mejiro family... and the bond you and I share.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I think it'll last forever, you know. Our bond.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Fifty years from now... this tree will have grown
huge. And we'll still be here together, talking
beside it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's just a wee tree at the moment. But in time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With good stewardship, this tree will grow to be
as everlasting as the Mejiro family itself.
